title: Blechnum schiedeanum
taxonomy: Blechnum schiedeanum is a species of fern in the family Blechnaceae. It is a member of the genus Blechnum, which includes various species of terrestrial ferns. The Blechnaceae family is a group of ferns that are native to the Americas, with a focus on tropical and subtropical regions. These ferns are often characterized by their simple or divided leaves, which can be found in a range of colors and patterns. Blechnum schiedeanum is an epiphytic fern that grows in the wild, often attached to other plants or trees.
